artworks.title: Threshold Field
artworks.description: A moment of transition where earth meets sky, where the familiar becomes something felt rather than seen.

artworks.title: Soft Horizon
artworks.description: The quality of light that exists only briefly—in the last warm hour before dark.

artworks.title: Afterlight
artworks.description: What remains when the day dissolves. A meditation on presence and absence.

artworks.title: Drift Between
artworks.description: The suspended moment between states—neither here nor there, but something in between.

artworks.title: Fading Distance
artworks.description: Distance as emotion. The way space can carry grief, or warmth, or quiet relief.

artworks.title: Untitled
artworks.description: A moment of contemplation. Light and shadow in conversation.
